message:
fix: improve GA measurement ID sanitization

Add sanitizeGaMeasurementId() that handles:
- Trailing newlines from env vars
- Accidental quoting from copy/paste mistakes
- Case-insensitive format validation

This is a more robust fix than just trimming - it handles
multiple common env var configuration issues.
